ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "satisfaction_level" REAL /* Satisfaction level of the employee (0-1) */,
  "last_evaluation" REAL /* Last evaluation score of the employee (0-1) */,
  "number_project" INTEGER /* Number of projects the employee has worked on */,
  "average_montly_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly hours worked by the employee */,
  "time_spend_company" INTEGER /* Time spent by the employee in the company (years) */,
  "work_accident" INTEGER /* Number of work accidents the employee has been involved in */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the employee (e.g., high school, bachelor, master) */,
  "job_involvement" REAL /* Job involvement level of the employee (0-1) */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the employee (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., IT, RandD, accounting) */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped working in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary_level" TEXT /* Salary level of the employee (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "base_salary" TEXT /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Bonus amount for the employee */,
  "stock_options" TEXT /* Stock options for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., meeting, email, phone call) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_participants" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved in the interaction */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the interaction (e.g., initiator, participant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., salary increase, role change) */,
  "new_job_title" TEXT /* New job title of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "promotion_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "left_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the company */,
  "destination_company" TEXT /* Destination company of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee attending the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., workshop, seminar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., employee of the month, best project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee with the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Score of the performance review (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
